title: Forge Maximize
description: A compilation of optimization/client-side utility mods for forge 1.20.1
body:
## about this modpack
**Forge Maximize** is an optimisation/utility modpack for **Forge 1.20.1 specifically**. It aims to enhance player experience with as few mods as possible. The point of this modpack is so you can start a modded Forge playthrough as fast as possible; you just throw this pack and never worry about it again, then you add any mod you want. You can also use it to play vanilla Minecraft.
## important
If you are planning to use this modpack with another Forge modpack, keep in mind that the majority of these modpacks have some of the mods here **pre-installed**. Forge Maximise's purpose is to help you **make your own modpack faster**. You can see the mod list by going:

**_Versions → click on a version → mods list under Dependencies_**

If you have any suggestions for mods to add or issues to report, you can leave them in the comments at [The Curse Forge page for Forge Maximize](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/forge-maximize) or the [discord](https://discord.gg/FcjkqZgxR2) server.
